mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_item_timer SET character_name = #{newName} WHERE character_name = #{oldName}
mapper.select: SELECT item_id, time_left, time_total FROM userdb.character_item_timer WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND item_timer_type = #{itemTimerType}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_item_timer SET time_left = #{timeLeft} WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND item_timer_type = #{itemTimerType} AND time_left >= #{minTimeLeft}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM userdb.character_item_timer WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND item_timer_type = #{itemTimerType}
DELETE FROM userdb.character_item_timer WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userdb.character_item_timer (character_id, character_name, item_timer_type, item_id, time_left, time_total) VALUES (#{characterId}, #{characterName}, #{itemTimerType}, #{itemId}, #{timeLeft}, #{timeTotal})
